section_miscategorizations.text: The patient's diabetes and asthma are being continued management.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is describing continuation of management (an explicit treatment/management action) rather than an assessment or diagnostic impression, so it belongs in the Plan.
This is correctly a follow-up plan; however, it is redundant with 'Schedule a follow-up appointment in four weeks.' The redundancy is organizational rather than a true miscategorization.
